---
title: "Currículum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div style="margin-bottom: 1.2rem;">
  <a href="assets/CV_academico_2026.pdf" 
     download="CV_Patricia_Loto_2026.pdf"
     class="btn btn-primary">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Descargar CV (PDF)
  </a>
</div>

<iframe 
  src="assets/CV_academico_2026.pdf" 
  width="100%" 
  height="900px" 
  style="border: none; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
</iframe>
